summary: The diff implements most requirements: REQ-37 (backend organisation field), REQ-38 (ProfileSetupModal with organisation), REQ-39 (RegistrationSuccessModal simulated cross-chain), REQ-40 (IPDetailModal simulated cross-chain), and REQ-41 (IPGT coin removal). REQ-36 is partially implemented — the RegisterIP page checks authentication and profile completion, but the evidence for ProfileSetupModal being triggered when profile is incomplete is ambiguous from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Visiting /register-ip while authenticated but profile-incomplete triggers the ProfileSetupModal before showing the form.
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt describes RegisterIP as showing a 'waiting state' for profile-incomplete users rather than explicitly triggering ProfileSetupModal. The truncated RegisterIP.tsx does not clearly show ProfileSetupModal being rendered or triggered from within RegisterIP when profile is incomplete.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to migrate old user profiles without organisation to new profiles with organisation defaulting to empty string.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request a migration module. REQ-37 only asked to add the organisation field and verify or add it if missing. The migration.mo file is an additional implementation not mentioned in any requirement.
